falsification_conditions.condition: The asset price rises by 10% from its current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and indicate a bullish trend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 50-day moving average crosses above the 200-day moving average (golden cross) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This technical breakout would signal a confirmed bullish trend, directly opposing the current indecision and HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The unemployment rate drops below 4% in the next 14 days (if applicable to the asset class)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong economic indicator like this would create clear bullish momentum, falsifying the current UNKNOWN/neutral stance.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
